description: 백엔드 코드 검증 시 타입 힌트, bare except, 하드코딩 시크릿, sync I/O, print 위반 탐지율 비교

evals.name: 위반 포함 엔드포인트 검증
evals.setup: Create flawed endpoint at src/backend/api/v1/test_flawed.py with: (1) missing return type hint, (2) bare except:, (3) hardcoded API_KEY='sk-xxx', (4) requests.get() sync call, (5) print() statement

violation_detection.check: count detected violations out of 5 planted

actionable_feedback.check: each violation has specific fix with code example

report_completeness.check: table format with PASS/FAIL per check

evals.name: 예외 케이스 정확성
evals.setup: Create test_something.py (test file with print/no type hints) and config.py (with default string values)

must_flag: only actual violations in production code

exception_handling.check: correctly skips test and config files

false_positive_avoidance.check: zero false positives on exempt files

evals.name: 다중 파일 일괄 검증
evals.setup: 3 Python files: 1 clean, 1 with 3 violations, 1 with 5 violations
